zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge於1385年7月20日出生在英國越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素時，他的父親Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York44歲，母親Isabella de Castilla30歲。他於1408年5月23日與Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1403年登記服兵役。他於1406年被列為knighted。他去世於1415年8月5日在英國哈普爾素坦普頓享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge was born on 20 July 1385, in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, was 44 and his mother, Isabella de Castilla, was 30. He married Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge on 23 May 1408. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1403. In 1406, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as knighted. He died on 5 August 1415, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge est né le 20 juillet 1385, à Conisbrough Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Castilla, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge le 23 mai 1408. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1403. En 1406, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knighted. Il est décédé le 5 août 1415, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge am 20. Juli 1385 in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York 44 und seine Mutter Isabella de Castilla 30. Er hat am 23. Mai 1408 Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1403 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1406, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knighted aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. August 1415 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Southampton, Hampshire, England und wurde in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge è nato il il 20 luglio 1385 nel Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Castilla, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge il 23 maggio 1408. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1403. Nel 1406, all'età di 21 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knighted. Morì il 5 agosto 1415, nel Southampton, Hampshire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Southampton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridgeが1385年7月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアコニスブロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of Yorkは44歳，母Isabella de Castillaは30歳であった。1408年5月23日にAnne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年に兵役登録をした。1406年，21歳の時，職業はknightedと記録されている。彼は1415年8月5日にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge(이)가 1385년 7월 20일 영국 요르크실르 코니스브루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Castilla(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1408년 5월 23일 Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1406년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knighted이었다. 그는 1415년 8월 5일 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge nasceu em 20 de julho de 1385, em Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Castilla, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge em 23 de maio de 1408. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1403. Em 1406, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como knighted. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1415, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge родился 20 июля 1385 г. в местности конисброую кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Castilla, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge 23 мая 1408 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1403 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1406 году, в возрасте 21 год, работал по профессии knighted. Он умер 5 августа 1415 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge nació el 20 de julio de 1385, en Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Isabella de Castilla, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge el 23 de mayo de 1408. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1403. En 1406, a la edad de 21 años, su ocupación registrada era knighted. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1415, en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
